apis.name: get_random_joke
apis.description: Get a random joke to tell the user. Use this when the user asks for a joke.

apis.name: get_weather
apis.description: Get current weather for a city. Use when the user asks about the weather.
apis._note: Free weather API — no key needed. City is path param, format=j1 for JSON.

apis.name: groww_place_order
apis.description: Place a new stock order on Groww. Use when the user wants to BUY or SELL a stock. IMPORTANT: Always confirm the trading_symbol, quantity, transaction_type (BUY/SELL), and order_type (MARKET/LIMIT) with the user before placing. For LIMIT orders also confirm the price.

trading_symbol.description: Trading symbol e.g. RELIANCE, WIPRO, IDEA, TCS, INFY

price.description: Price per share in ₹ (required for LIMIT/SL orders, use 0 for MARKET)

trigger_price.description: Trigger price in ₹ (required for SL/SL-M orders)

order_reference_id.description: Unique 8-20 char alphanumeric reference ID with max 2 hyphens

apis.name: groww_modify_order
apis.description: Modify an existing open/pending order on Groww. Use when the user wants to change quantity, price or order type of an existing order.

apis.name: groww_cancel_order
apis.description: Cancel an existing open/pending order on Groww. Use when the user wants to cancel a placed order.

apis.name: groww_get_order_list
apis.description: Get the list of all orders placed today on Groww — includes open, pending, executed and cancelled orders. Use when the user asks about their orders, order history, or 'what did I buy/sell today'.

segment.description: Segment filter — CASH, FNO, or COMMODITY

apis.name: groww_get_order_status
apis.description: Check the status of a specific order on Groww using its order ID.

apis.name: groww_get_order_detail
apis.description: Get full details of a specific order including price, quantity, fill status, timestamps. Use when user asks for details about a particular order.

apis.name: groww_get_holdings
apis.description: Get user's current stock holdings from the DEMAT account on Groww. Use when the user asks about 'my holdings', 'my portfolio', 'what stocks do I own', 'show my investments'.

apis.name: groww_get_positions
apis.description: Get user's current positions on Groww — includes intraday and carry-forward positions with P&L. Use when the user asks about 'my positions', 'today's trades', 'my P&L', 'am I in profit'.

segment.description: Segment filter — CASH, FNO, or COMMODITY

apis.name: groww_get_ltp
apis.description: Get the latest traded price (LTP) for one or more stocks on Groww. Use when the user asks 'what is the price of Reliance', 'show me INFY price', 'current price of TCS'. Supports up to 50 symbols.

segment.description: Segment — CASH for stocks, FNO for derivatives

apis.name: groww_get_quote
apis.description: Get full live market quote for a stock including OHLC, market depth, 52-week high/low, volume. Use when user wants detailed market data for a stock.

trading_symbol.description: Trading symbol e.g. RELIANCE, NIFTY, BANKNIFTY

apis.name: groww_get_margin
apis.description: Get the user's available margin details on Groww — shows clear cash, margin used, collateral, and segment-wise breakdown. Use when user asks 'how much money do I have', 'my available balance', 'margin available'.

apis.name: groww_calculate_margin
apis.description: Calculate the margin required for a specific order before placing it. Use when the user asks 'how much margin do I need to buy X shares of Y', 'can I afford to buy this stock'.

price.description: Price per share in ₹ (for LIMIT orders)

apis._note: Body is sent as a JSON array [{ ... }] — the agent wraps it.

apis.name: bajaj_get_profile
apis.description: Get the Bajaj Broking user profile — name, email, mobile, PAN, exchanges, POA status. Use when the user asks 'who am I', 'my profile', 'my account details'.

apis.name: bajaj_get_funds
apis.description: Get the user's funds and margin details on Bajaj Broking — available funds, buying power, cash available, margin utilized, realized/unrealized P&L. Use when the user asks 'my funds', 'how much money do I have', 'available balance', 'margin'.

apis.name: bajaj_get_holdings
apis.description: Get the user's stock holdings (portfolio) on Bajaj Broking — shows all stocks owned with symbol, quantity, average buy price, LTP, and P&L. Use when the user asks 'my portfolio', 'my holdings', 'what stocks do I own', 'show my investments'.

apis.name: bajaj_get_positions
apis.description: Get the user's current open positions on Bajaj Broking — intraday and delivery positions with P&L. Use when the user asks 'my positions', 'today's trades', 'open positions'.

apis.name: bajaj_get_orderbook
apis.description: Get all orders placed today on Bajaj Broking — includes open, executed, cancelled, and rejected orders. Use when the user asks 'my orders', 'order book', 'what orders did I place', 'order status'.

apis.name: bajaj_get_order_by_id
apis.description: Get details of a specific order by its order ID on Bajaj Broking. Use when the user asks about a specific order with an ID.

order_id.description: The RMS order ID to look up

apis.name: bajaj_get_tradebook
apis.description: Get the tradebook on Bajaj Broking — all executed trades today. Use when the user asks 'my trades', 'tradebook', 'executed trades'.

apis.name: bajaj_place_order
apis.description: Place a new stock order on Bajaj Broking. Use when the user wants to BUY or SELL a stock. IMPORTANT: Always confirm the symbol, quantity, and action (BUY/SELL) with the user BEFORE placing. Say the details aloud and ask 'Should I go ahead?'.

symbol.description: Trading symbol e.g. RELIANCE, TCS, HDFCBANK, INFY

order_type.description: Order type — RL-M for market, RL for limit, SL for stop-loss

product.description: Product type — D for delivery, I for intraday

limit_price.description: Limit price in ₹ (use 0 for market orders)

sl_price.description: Stop-loss trigger price in ₹ (use 0 if not SL order)

order_tag.description: Optional tag for the order (can be empty string)

apis.name: bajaj_modify_order
apis.description: Modify an existing open/pending order on Bajaj Broking. Use when the user wants to change quantity, price, or stop-loss of an existing order.

order_type.description: Order type — RL-M, RL, or SL

apis.name: bajaj_cancel_order
apis.description: Cancel an existing open/pending order on Bajaj Broking. Use when the user wants to cancel a placed order.

apis.name: bajaj_get_stock_quote
apis.description: Get the live/current market price (LTP) and details for one or more stocks on Bajaj Broking. Use when the user asks 'price of Reliance', 'what is TCS price', 'current price of INFY', 'latest price of Vi and Google', 'how much is HDFC?'. Pass the NSE trading symbol(s). For multiple stocks, call this tool once per stock IN PARALLEL.

symbol.description: NSE trading symbol of the stock — e.g. IDEA (for Vi/Vodafone Idea), GOOGL (for Google/Alphabet), RELIANCE, TCS, INFY, HDFCBANK, WIPRO, SBIN, TATAMOTORS, ITC, BAJFINANCE. Common mappings: Vi=IDEA, Google=GOOGL, Vodafone=IDEA, Infosys=INFY, State Bank=SBIN

exchange.description: Exchange — NSE or BSE. Default NSE.

apis.name: bajaj_get_index_data
apis.description: Get live index data for Indian stock market indices — NIFTY, SENSEX, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY, etc. Use when the user asks 'how is nifty doing', 'sensex today', 'index performance', 'market overview'.

indexname.description: Index name — NIFTY, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY, NIFTYNXT50, NIFTYMIDCAP, SENSEX, INDIA VIX, NIFTY500, NIFTY100

apis.name: bajaj_get_stock_news
apis.description: Get latest stock market news from Google News RSS for a specific stock or query. Use when the user asks about stock news, market news, or 'what's happening with Reliance'.

q.description: Search query — e.g. 'RELIANCE stock site:moneycontrol.com OR site:livemint.com'

databases.name: appdb
databases.description: Main application database — you can create tables, insert data, query data, and manage records here.
